allow: Bash(find app/ components/ -name '*.tsx' -exec sed -i 's/ease: "easeOut"/ease: [0, 0, 0.4, 1] as const/g; s/ease: "easeInOut"/ease: [0.4, 0, 0.6, 1] as const/g' '{}' ';')
Bash(find app/ components/ -name '*.tsx' -name '*.css' -exec sed -i 's/#0070f3/#cc1111/g; s/#3b9eff/#ff4444/g; s/rgba\(0,112,243/rgba\(204,17,17/g' '{}' ';')
Bash(find app/ components/ -name '*.tsx' -exec sed -i 's/#50e3c2/#ff4444/g; s/rgba\(80,227,194/rgba\(255,68,68/g; s/text-\\[#50e3c2\\]/text-[#ff4444]/g' '{}' ';')
